## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX team members to Dimmo and discuss current SEO strategy challenges and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has published 45 product reviews since Friday, with 8 more planned this week](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Dimmo is experiencing low click-through rates (50/week) despite high impressions](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Current strategy focus: enriching product pages vs. creating blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Troy (Dimmo) expresses concern about justifying continued engagement without significant traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction and Transition

  - [Megan Dickey: New director responsible for Dimmo's strategy](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Jenn Peters: Managing editor, overseeing content production](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Prateep has left; transition period in progress](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

### Content Production Progress

  - [45 product reviews published since Friday](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [8 more reviews to be completed this week](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Megan working on a new strategy plan, to be presented in coming days](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Current Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions are high, but clicks are low (≈50/week)](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [One-time spike to 70 clicks, then settled around 50](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Troy's expectation: 100k-50k monthly visitors by 6 months; reality: ≈200/month](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Strategy Shift and Challenges

  - [Initial focus: blog creation (first 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Current focus: enriching product pages with unique data (demos, transcriptions, AI-extracted features)](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Challenge: driving traffic at scale to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Technical improvements implemented (98% complete), but not yielding desired results](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Proposed Next Steps

  - [Redo SEO keyword research for more relevant terms](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Analyze pages with highest impressions to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Review page structure, length, and headers against top competitors](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Focus on high search volume keywords and refresh top-ranking pages](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Develop a "playbook" based on successful optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Content Optimization Ideas

  - [Condense overly long pages](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Optimize headers to reduce repetition](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Maintain "pricing features and demo" focus in titles](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Analyze top-ranking competitor pages for structural insights](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan and Jenn to prepare full strategy overview for next Wednesday's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Complete remaining 8 product review posts this week](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Analyze recent traffic spike (70 clicks) to identify successful elements](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Review and optimize top-ranking pages based on competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Develop strategy to increase clicks above 50/week threshold](https://fathom.video/share/pFVXsEm_KSrdCjyKHuLEWV3Gg42yvYxK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
